title: Senior Software Engineer - Unisys India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Unisys India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Unisys India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Unisys India:
Unisys India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
